question: What may an amateur, whose license has expired for more than 5 years, do to become licensed again (subject to the assignment of a different call sign)?

choices.A: Apply for renewal and pay prescribed fees and surcharges to NTC
choices.B: Pass the appropriate examination and pay surcharges for every year expired to NTC
choices.C: Attend a seminar on current Radio Laws and Radio Ethics with the national amateur organization and prescribed fees for a new license to NTC
